raw_consumer_statement:
Citi card ending in XXXX was paid on XX/XX/year> and had a XXXX balance on purchases before XX/XX/year>. A number of fraudulent charges were made on this card begining on XXXX {$1600.00}. The company has resolved {$540.00} of these fraudulent charges and claims the issue has been resolved, leaving {$1300.00} of fraudulent charges on the replacement credit card ending in XXXX. 

I have not activated the replacement card ending in XXXX. There have been no charges by me on any Citi card after XX/XX/year>.
